taxonomy: Agaloma gracilis is a species within the family Sapotaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the sapote family. This family is part of the larger order Ericales, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The order Ericales is further grouped into the clade known as the asterids, which also includes many other flowering plant families. The asterids are a subgroup of the larger clade called the angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants. Agaloma gracilis is therefore classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
